name_en: 🔥The denim embroidery series is very popular. Denim elements are completely timeless, and they look super stylish no matter how you style them. This shoulder bag is simple and sharp, with the metal accents perfectly embellished. A summer bestseller. Model: M95050, Size: 26x15x9cm
